title: Hypotheses, Objectives, Endpoints, and Case Definitions (Part 2 of Phase 3 study of Vaccine Candidate for COVID-19)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"32j8o","text":"This is Part 2 of \"Phase 3 randomized, double-blinded, placebo-controlled trial to evaluate the safety, immunogenicity, and efficacy of Vaccine Candidate against COVID-19 in adults \u003e 18 years of age\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":136,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fg83k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"59eu8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9mq46","text":"This generic Phase 3 protocol was developed by the PATH team with support of the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation. The aim of the collection is to share recommended best practices in designing and implementing a Phase 3 study of a COVID-19 vaccine candidate. As Phase 3 trials of different Vaccine Candidates  proceed around the world, following the same protocols will ensure consistency and comparability of the Phase 3 trial results.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9mn30","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a45ul","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cj1rr","text":"Please note that this is an evolving document, to be versioned and updated, based on community feedback and new data.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

The geometric mean nAb titers, geometric mean fold rise, and seroconversion rate will be reported. Seroconversion rate will be defined as a baseline titer below the limit of detection (LOD) or lower level of quantitation (LLOQ) with the post-baseline titer above LOD/LLOQ. The overall seroresponse rate (e.g., negative-to-positive or ≥4-fold rise among those initially positive) will be summarized separately. The frequency of XX-fold rise or greater among those initially positive will also be summarized.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":158,"length":3},{"style":"bold","offset":625,"length":2},{"style":"italic","offset":502,"length":74}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4a12","text":"IgG ELISA bAb in specimens collected at 6 and 12 months after vaccination in a random subset of participants. Case definitions of COVID-19-confirmed cases","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":49}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dd44l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5aoft","text":"The case definition for participants that meet the primary endpoint of this Phase 3 trial is defined as, RT-PCR confirmed (PCR+) COVID-19 (i.e., symptomatic SARS-CoV-2 infection) of any severity.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":105,"length":89},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":145,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cl59b","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e2msq","text":"COVID-19 positive status includes participants with A) mild, or B) severe signs/ symptoms [17]. ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"887oh","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9mmar","text":"This includes the following:","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"g1b0","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"563iu","text":"2.3.1.     Mild COVID-19: Respiratory tract infection with or without general systemic symptoms including one or more of the following:","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":135}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"adtlv","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c0h6l","text":"Fever or chills","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fpb99","text":"Cough","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"23fl0","text":"Shortness of breath or difficulty breathing","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eapoi","text":"Fatigue","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5d52f","text":"Muscle or body aches","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"41rnt","text":"Headache","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d9ui0","text":"New loss of taste or smell","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"38aiv","text":"Sore throat","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aqgic","text":"Congestion or runny nose","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d42uc","text":"Nausea or vomiting","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"386da","text":"Diarrhea","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ds8fo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dbmnh","text":"2.3.1.     Severe COVID-19: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3qhv5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c4p3h","text":"Clinical signs at rest indicative of severe systemic illness (respiratory rate ≥ 30 per minute, heart rate ≥ 125 per minute, SpO2 ≤ 93 percent on room air at sea level or PaO2/FiO2 \u003c 300 mm Hg)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"39crg","text":"Respiratory failure (defined as needing high-flow oxygen, noninvasive ventilation, mechanical ventilation or ECMO)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3uk2p","text":"Evidence of shock (SBP \u003c 90 mm Hg, DBP \u003c 60 mm Hg, or requiring vasopressors)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9epnp","text":"Significant acute renal, hepatic, or neurologic dysfunction","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b14nu","text":"Admission to an ICU","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"67fb7","text":"Death","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"qi7t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"78gs3","text":"Severe COVID-19 cases are a subset of all cases, and participants may present initially to health care providers as a mild case. All participants will be followed until resolution of their disease, even if the initial presentation is classified as mild. Upon resolution of the COVID-19 episode, participants will continue to be followed through study end in the same manner as those who have not presented disease. Reinfections occurring in individuals who were infected earlier will not be counted towards the primary objective, however they will be considered for secondary analysis (see analysis section).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ch7c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fb1b3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fur96","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"21ohm","text":"LITERATURE CITED","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qbqa","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f96va","text":"17.
